name: nekko-paw
description: Local-first AI coding & cowork desktop app with first-class local model support.
author: ermish

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @nekko/host && npm run build -w @nekko/desktop
scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @nekko/shared && npm run build -w @nekko/core
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @nekko/shared && npm run typecheck -w @nekko/core && npm run typecheck -w @nekko/host && npm run typecheck -w @nekko/desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w @nekko/desktop
